title: havardia acatlensis
intro: Havardia acatlensis, also known as the Guadalupe Baronia or Mexican Baronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Havardia acatlensis include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Havardia acatlensis is typically prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and roots, which can be administered to alleviate various health conditions.
